selection_basis.ledger_reason: This was the final strong active-system source-like sibling after the remaining a1_state normalization layer.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the final active-system outer shell into a smaller controller-usable fence set without rereading raw outer-shell sources or promoting shell scaffolds into lower-loop law.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Strongest next active synthesis packet once the final outer shell is narrowed.
Strongest work-surface follow-on if the queue moves to shadow and wrapper residue next.
Strongest later work-surface packet once spillover governance residue becomes the focus.

raw_source_reread_reason: Parent artifacts already isolate the residual A2 kernel hierarchy, derived sidecar boundary, control-plane/runtime split, tooling shell, and spec-drift residue needed for this bounded reduction.

notes: This batch preserves the final active-system outer shell as a proposal-only controller fence set rather than lower-loop truth.
